payload.answer: You shared a music-listening preference. Since this appears additive unless it conflicts with an existing saved preference, here are possible repair choices.
repair_options: Add this as a separate preference: prefers Sonny Rollins over John Coltrane for relaxed Sunday listening.
Keep both this preference and any existing jazz-listening preferences, if present.
If there is an existing conflicting preference about Sonny Rollins vs. John Coltrane for relaxed Sunday listening, ask the user whether this replaces it or should coexist as context-specific.
